value.0: The forge is cold and still.
The forge flares and steams mightily.

This horrible smelling suit of plate armor is of obvious orcish design.  It offers good protection against all physical attacks though movement is difficult and stealth is impossible.  Due to the weight and size, smaller races will not be able to fit in this armor.
A suit of heavy plate armor.

The most popular of the Spade ("Chan") weapons is the Crescent Moon, these were primarily monk's weapons. The crescent moon is used to hook an enemy's weapon, while the head of the shovel is used to attack the head or foot of the enemy.
